citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
If the Tenant's Rent instalments account falls into arrears, the Landlord will be entitled to seek payment from the Tenant's guarantor
Where a Rent account is in arrears by two monthly instalments, the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit
If the tenant has agreed to a 39-week or 51-week tenancy and paid in full for the total duration before 04 September 2025 they are entitled to a 2% discount.
If you move out before the end of the Tenancy Agreement, you remain liable for the accommodation fees for the full period until

findings.text: Total rent is £4,686.18 including a £500 advance payment, with a daily rate of £28.23.
The agreement states a rent schedule will be provided separately; it is not included in source NAP-SRC-0010.
Arrears of two monthly instalments trigger a 28-day notice to quit; guarantor may be pursued for arrears.
Early termination liability continues until end of term or replacement student moves in; 2% discount available for full upfront payment.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Source Search Result

**Task:** T-NAP-SRC-0010-015
**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence Agreement)

### Findings
- The agreement references a separate rent schedule (clause 2(a)) and payment records (clause 2(b)-(e)).
- No rent schedule, payment receipts, or arrears statements were found within the provided source.
- No additional sources were supplied in this work order.

### Recommendation
Proceed with proposed task T-NAP-SRC-0010-016 to locate the rent schedule and payment records from the university's accommodation office or tenant's records.
proposed_artifacts.title: Source Search Result for Rent Schedule and Payment Records

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search for the rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) of the tenancy agreement (NAP-SRC-0010) and any payment records (receipts, statements, arrears notices) for tenant Miss Anfal Elbushra (Edinburgh Napier number 40805511). Check the university's accommodation portal, email correspondence, and any guarantor communications. If found, extract and add as new sources.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate rent schedule and payment records for Miss Anfal Elbushra

risk_flags.text: Missing rent schedule and payment records prevent verification of arrears calculation and notice validity.
The agreement's early termination liability clause may be challenged under Scottish student accommodation regulations.
No evidence of compliance with the Housing (Scotland) Act 2001 minimum notice requirements for termination.

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0010 (student licence agreement). The agreement references a separate rent schedule and payment records not included in the provided source. No additional sources were supplied. Proposed follow-up task to locate the rent schedule and payment records.

uncertainties.text: The actual rent schedule and payment records are not provided; their contents are unknown.
Whether the tenant made any payments beyond the £500 advance is not evidenced in the provided source.
The guarantor's identity and any demand for payment are not documented in the provided materials.
